rationale: Trump halting Iran strikes and claiming a deal has caused stock market surges, which indirectly benefits Poland's economy and energy price outlook, but no structural confirmation exists; the Russia-Ukraine war continues without new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; markets surge
top_events.summary: Trump called off new strikes on Iran and claimed a deal is close; stock markets surged globally. For Poland, this means lower energy price pressure and calmer financial markets, though nothing is confirmed.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No qualitative escalation this cycle; war remains background noise for Poland's security calculus.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines
top_events.summary: At least 37 dead; geographically distant, no direct relevance to Poland.
